title: Cuneiform Tablet #0618: Ur III Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
